con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.intuit.com/ias/common/xsd" xmlns:xsd1="http://www.intuit.com/ias/notification/pub/xsd" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"> <soapenv:Header> <xsd:Header ServiceVersion="?"> <!--Optional:--> <xsd:TransactionId>test123</xsd:TransactionId> <xsd:CallerSystem>SOAPUI_DEVTEST</xsd:CallerSystem> <xsd:SourceSystem>SOAPUI_DEVTEST</xsd:SourceSystem> </xsd:Header> </soapenv:Header> <soapenv:Body> <xsd1:SendRequest Version="1.0"> <Notification> <!--You may enter the following 5 items in any order--> <NotificationType>EMAIL</NotificationType> <DeliveryType> <Immediate/> </DeliveryType> <SenderProfile> <SenderId>${#Project#senderID}</SenderId> </SenderProfile> <ContentProfile> <Content xsi:type="xsd1:BasicContentDataType"> <ContentId>PSP_DEV_TEST_EMAIL</ContentId> </Content> <TemplateProperties> <Attribute> <Name>OfferingName</Name> <Value>Test Payroll Service Offering</Value> </Attribute> </TemplateProperties> </ContentProfile> <Destinations> <Destination> <RecipientId>recp_1</RecipientId> <Recipient xsi:type="xsd1:BasicRecipientDataType"> <Address>ken_paul@intuit.com</Address> </Recipient> <Format>HTML</Format> <TemplateProperties> <Attribute> <Name>PSPTestParam</Name> <Value>This is a valid test parameter.</Value> </Attribute> </TemplateProperties> </Destination> </Destinations> </Notification> </xsd1:SendRequest> </soapenv:Body> </soapenv:Envelope>

con:part.con:content: <!--edited with XMLSpy v2007 sp1 (http://www.altova.com) by Fred Chen (Intuit)--> <wsdl:definitions targetNamespace="http://www.intuit.com/ias/notification/pub/wsdl" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:http="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/http/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soapenc="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" xmlns:mime="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/mime/" xmlns:nts="http://www.intuit.com/ias/notification/pub/xsd" xmlns:tns="http://www.intuit.com/ias/notification/pub/wsdl" xmlns:ns1="http://www.intuit.com/ias/common/xsd"> <wsdl:types> <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://www.intuit.com/ias/notification/pub/xsd" elementFormDefault="qualified"> <xsd:include schemaLocation="notification.xsd"/> </xsd:schema> <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://www.intuit.com/ias/common/xsd" elementFormDefault="qualified"> <xsd:include schemaLocation="common.xsd"/> </xsd:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="SendRequest"> <wsdl:part name="header" element="ns1:Header"/> <wsdl:part name="body" element="nts:SendRequest"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="SendResponse"> <wsdl:part name="header" element="ns1:Header"/> <wsdl:part name="body" element="nts:SendResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="Fault"> <wsdl:part name="fault" element="ns1:Error"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="NotificationPort"> <wsdl:operation name="Send"> <wsdl:input message="tns:SendRequest"/> <wsdl:output message="tns:SendResponse"/> <wsdl:fault name="Fault" message="tns:Fault"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="NotificationSoapBinding" type="tns:NotificationPort"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="Send"> <soap:operation soapAction="Send"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body parts="body" use="literal"/> <soap:header message="tns:SendRequest" part="header" use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body parts="body" use="literal"/> <soap:header message="tns:SendResponse" part="header" use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> <wsdl:fault name="Fault"> <soap:fault name="Fault" use="literal"/> </wsdl:fault> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="NotificationService"> <wsdl:port name="NotificationPort" binding="tns:NotificationSoapBinding"> <soap:address location="http://www.intuit.com/notificationservice"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>

<!--edited with XMLSpy v2007 sp1 (http://www.altova.com) by Fred Chen (Intuit)--> <xs:schema targetNamespace="http://www.intuit.com/ias/common/xsd" elementFormDefault="qualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified" version="1.0" xmlns="http://www.intuit.com/ias/common/xsd" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="Error" type="ErrorDataType"/> <xs:complexType name="ErrorDataType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="Category"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>The category of the error. i.e. SYSTEM,INPUT,BUSINESS_LOGIC</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:simpleType> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>The category of the error. i.e. SYSTEM,INPUT,BUSINESS_LOGIC</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="SYSTEM"/> <xs:enumeration value="INPUT"/> <xs:enumeration value="TRANSITORY"/> <xs:enumeration value="BUSINESS_LOGIC"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="Code" type="IDDataType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>The code that identifies the error that occurs</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="Description" type="DescriptionDataType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Human readeable description of the error. This field should not be used in error handling logic and should not be returned directly to the customer</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="Source" type="SystemIDDataType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>if present, describe where in the system the error occured</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="Header" type="HeaderDataType"/> <xs:complexType name="HeaderDataType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="TransactionId" type="IDDataType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Optional: An optional identifier client applications can set to indicate this request is part of a transaction. If set, the Notification Service retrieves the TransactionId sent in the request and returns the value in the response Header/TransactionId field. If the client application does not set this field, the Notification Service internally generates a unique identifier and returns that value in the responose Header/TransactionId field.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="InternalRequestId" type="IDDataType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>(Not Used For Request) This field contains a unique identifier generated by the Notification Service to represent the specific request/response. It is used by the response message. Client applications do not set this field in the request. The Notification Service ignores any value set in the request.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="CreationDateTime" type="xs:dateTime" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>The date/time of the request in ISO8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss{tz} where tz is the timezone designation +-hh:mm or Z for UTC time.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="CallerSystem" type="SystemIDDataType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Identifier for the entity calling the Notification Service.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="SourceSystem" type="SystemIDDataType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Identifier for system originating the request to the Notification Service.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="Endpoint" type="SystemIDDataType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>(Not Used For Request) This field is set by the Notification Service in the Response header to indicate which system serviced the request.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="ServiceVersion" type="VersionDataType" use="required"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>The version of the service to call. This attribute is currently not used by the service, but the value should be set to 1.0.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:attribute> </xs:complexType> <xs:simpleType name="VersionDataType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="0"/> <xs:maxLength value="10"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="SystemIDDataType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="1"/> <xs:maxLength value="100"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="IDDataType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="1"/> <xs:maxLength value="100"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="DescriptionDataType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="1"/> <xs:maxLength value="1000"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> </xs:schema>

<!--edited with XMLSpy v2007 sp1 (http://www.altova.com) by Fred Chen (Intuit)--> <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://www.intuit.com/ias/notification/pub/xsd" elementFormDefault="unqualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified" xmlns:ias="http://www.intuit.com/ias/common/xsd" xmlns="http://www.intuit.com/ias/notification/pub/xsd" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xsd:import namespace="http://www.intuit.com/ias/common/xsd" schemaLocation="common.xsd"/> <xsd:simpleType name="AddressDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Data type for an address value</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:minLength value="1"/> <xsd:maxLength value="100"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:complexType name="AttributeDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Name/Value pair data type</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> <xsd:all> <xsd:element name="Name" type="AttributeNameDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Data type for an attribute name. Attribute names must contain characters only from the character set A-Z, a-Z, 0-9, the period character (.), the space character ( ), the underscore character (_), or the hyphen character (-)</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Value" type="AttributeValueDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Data type for an attribute value</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> </xsd:all> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:simpleType name="AttributeNameDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Data type for an attribute name. Attribute names must contain characters only from the character set A-Z, a-Z, 0-9, the period character (.), the underscore character (_), or the hyphen character (-)</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:pattern value="[A-Za-z][ A-Za-z\d\._\-]{0,99}"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="AttributeValueDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Data type for an attribute value</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:minLength value="1"/> <xsd:maxLength value="100000"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:complexType name="BasicContentDataType"> <xsd:complexContent> <xsd:extension base="ContentDataType"> <xsd:all> <xsd:element name="ContentProviderId" type="ias:IDDataType" minOccurs="0"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>If specified, identifies the source of the content. Currently, this element is not used.</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ContentId" type="ias:IDDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Unique identifier for the content</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Subject" type="ias:DescriptionDataType" minOccurs="0"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Subject/purpose of this notification</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> </xsd:all> </xsd:extension> </xsd:complexContent> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="BasicRecipientDataType"> <xsd:complexContent> <xsd:extension base="RecipientDataType"> <xsd:all> <xsd:element name="Address" type="AddressDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Address of recipient</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Name" type="NameDataType" minOccurs="0"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Name of recipient</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> </xsd:all> </xsd:extension> </xsd:complexContent> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="BasicSenderDataType"> <xsd:complexContent> <xsd:extension base="SenderDataType"> <xsd:all> <xsd:element name="Address" type="AddressDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Email Address of sender</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Name" type="NameDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Name of sender</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> </xsd:all> </xsd:extension> </xsd:complexContent> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="ContentDataType"/> <xsd:simpleType name="NameDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Data type for an name</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:minLength value="1"/> <xsd:maxLength value="100"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:complexType name="NotificationDataType"> <xsd:all> <xsd:element name="NotificationType" type="NotificationTypeDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Type of notification. Currently, only EMAIL is supported</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="DeliveryType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Specifies the type of delivery. Currently, only Immediate is supported</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:choice> <xsd:element name="Immediate"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Specifies the notification should be sent immediately</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> <xsd:complexType/> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Scheduled" type="xsd:dateTime"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Specifies the notification should be sent at a later date/time</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Delayed" type="TimeIntervalDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Specifies the notification should be sent by time offset from now.</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> </xsd:choice> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="SenderProfile"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Describes the sender of the notification. if not specified, the default sender configured in the provider is assumed</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:all> <xsd:element name="SenderId" type="ias:IDDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>A unique identifier is assigned to each offering team using the Notification Service.</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Sender" type="SenderDataType" minOccurs="0"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Describes the sender of the notification. Caller must pass in a derived element of this type</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> </xsd:all> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ContentProfile"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Specifies the content and it's properties</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:all> <xsd:element name="Content" type="ContentDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Describes the content of the notification. Caller must pass in a derived element of this type</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="TemplateProperties" minOccurs="0"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Content scoped properties used for notification template substitutions</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Attribute" type="AttributeDataType" maxOccurs="100"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:all> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Destinations"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Describes the recipient(s) of the notification</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Destination" maxOccurs="1000"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>One or more recipients of the notification</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:all> <xsd:element name="RecipientId" type="ias:IDDataType" minOccurs="0"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Uniquely identifies the receiver for this request, as specified by the client.</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Recipient" type="RecipientDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Describes the recipient of the notification message. Caller must pass in a derived element of this type</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Format" type="ContentFormatDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>The format that the recipient will receive the message in. Currently supported are HTML or Text</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="TemplateProperties" minOccurs="0"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Per recipient scoped properties used for notification template substiutions</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Attribute" type="AttributeDataType" maxOccurs="100"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:all> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:all> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:simpleType name="NotificationTypeDataType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="EMAIL"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:complexType name="RecipientDataType"/> <xsd:attributeGroup name="RequestAttributeGroup"> <xsd:attribute name="Version" type="ias:VersionDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>The version of the request. If not set, the most current version is assumed.</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:attribute> </xsd:attributeGroup> <xsd:attributeGroup name="ResponseAttributeGroup"> <xsd:attribute name="Version" type="ias:VersionDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>The version of the response. If not set, the most current version is assumed.</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:attribute> </xsd:attributeGroup> <!--Success data type--> <xsd:complexType name="SuccessDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Success data type</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="SenderDataType"/> <!--SendNotification--> <xsd:element name="SendRequest"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:all> <xsd:element name="Notification" type="NotificationDataType"/> </xsd:all> <xsd:attributeGroup ref="RequestAttributeGroup"/> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <!--SendResponse--> <xsd:element name="SendResponse"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Response to SendRequest</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Error" type="ias:ErrorDataType" minOccurs="0"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>If an unexpected system error or an input error occurred while processing the entire request, this element will be set detailing the error. If one more more BUSINESS_LOGIC errors occured in the request, this error will be set to summarize a BUSINESS_LOGIC error occured. The Result element(s) will also be set to to describe the details of the BUSINESS_LOGIC error(s) that occured.</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Result" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="RecipientId" type="ias:IDDataType" minOccurs="0"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>The unique identifier of the recipient as specified in the request</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> <xsd:choice> <xsd:element name="Success" type="SuccessDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Indicates the request for notification to the specified receiver was received and achknowledged</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Error" type="ias:ErrorDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>The error that occured specifically on the receiver</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> </xsd:choice> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> <xsd:attributeGroup ref="ResponseAttributeGroup"/> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:simpleType name="TimeUnitDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>The unit of time. MONTH, YEAR, ETC.</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="MINUTE"/> <xsd:enumeration value="HOUR"/> <xsd:enumeration value="DAY"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:complexType name="TimeIntervalDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>Represents an interval of time interval."</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> <xsd:all> <xsd:element name="TimeUnit" type="TimeUnitDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>The time interval's unit of time.</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="TimeAmount" type="TimeAmountDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>The time interval amount. For example, if TimeUnit is MONTH and this is set to"1", this means 1month..</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> </xsd:element> </xsd:all> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:simpleType name="TimeAmountDataType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer"> <xsd:minExclusive value="0"/> <xsd:maxExclusive value="100000"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="ContentFormatDataType"> <xsd:annotation> <xsd:documentation>The format of the content that the content should be sent in.</xsd:documentation> </xsd:annotation> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="Text"/> <xsd:enumeration value="HTML"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:schema>
